Practice Plans OnDeck Tools Try It Free

The Next Coach
Deserves Better.

Every season, thousands of parents volunteer to coach with no tools, no training, and no one showing them the ropes. We've been there. Now we're building what we wish we had. And we need your help to get it right.

See What We're Building
Interactive Demo

Here's what we're working on

Game Day handles lineups, batting orders, and position rotations so every kid gets fair playing time. No kid sits the bench all game. Tap an inning to see how it works.

Game Day
Thunderbolts
vs Seattle Storm
Inning
Tap an inning to see the rotation
Playing Time Fairness
Music
Game Plan
Coach

This is a work in progress. We're building it with real coaches to make sure it actually works on the field, not just on a screen.

What Coaches Asked For

What We're Building Together

♻

Fair Rotations

Coaches told us the hardest part of game day is making sure every kid gets a fair shot. So we built rotations that move players through different positions each inning.

⚽

Smart Batting Orders

We heard from coaches who were scribbling lineups on napkins five minutes before first pitch. Set your batting order once and see it alongside your defensive lineup.

📊

Playing Time Tracking

The number one parent complaint: "My kid never plays." Coaches asked for a simple way to prove every kid gets fair time. So we built a tracker that shows it at a glance.

📝

In Game Notes

Coaches wanted a way to jot down quick notes during the game without losing track of the action. Tap any player, leave a note, and share it with your assistants.

📲

Live for Parents

Every coach has heard it: "Where does my kid play next?" We're working on a way for parents to see the lineup on their own phone so you can focus on coaching.

⚡

Battery Management

Coaches told us that pitcher/catcher combos throw off the whole rotation. So we built the system to plan around your battery and keep everything else balanced.

Help Us Build This

Join coaches who are shaping Game Day from the ground up. Tell us what works, what doesn't, and what you wish existed. Your feedback builds the next version.

No spam. Just updates on what we're building.

You're in. We'll be in touch.

Thanks for being part of this. We'll share what's next soon.

Ready Now

While we build Game Day, these tools are ready today

📋

Practice Plans

Generate a complete, age appropriate practice plan in 30 seconds. 16 sports, 5,798 drills.

Try it free →
🎵

OnDeck Walkup Music

Walkup songs and announcer intros for every player. Make every kid feel like a pro.

Download on iOS →
